mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, create_time, update_time FROM users ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, name, email, create_time, update_time FROM users WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
